name: Macaroni Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Elbow macaroni (small), cooked according to directions
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pasta well.
2. Mix in the oil and vinegar and mix well.
3. Add all other ingredients and mix well.
4. Refrigerate overnight.
5. The next day, if needed, add more mayo and mix well.
6. Adjust for salt and pepper. After it sits overnight, it tends to need more salt.
